creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 202775
qgis-ltr

Rainer,

Since QGIS have LTR for QGIS 3, I think we can propose the LTR version (3.4) and the current version (3.6).

Personally, I prefer to distribute the LTR version for production and use the current test version for pre-production.

If maintaining both is too much for you, I can manage this one.

Ports are based on previous version with some improvements.
